title: Best Pair What Eva Characters Do You Ship
display_title: Best Pair What Eva Characters Do You Ship
wikitext:
[]: fav couples             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Nov 14, 2005 3:50 pm Mah fav couple would havfta be Toji Suzuhara and Hikari Horaki. OMG they are such a good couple I don't know why but its true. They have the least amount of issues between them of all the relationships in the show. Love always Yuko-chan

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Mon Nov 14, 2005 3:57 pm Uh...except the fact that they never actually became a couple. o__o;; Remember? I'm an A/S shipper, but I like Kaji/Misato, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Nov 14, 2005 3:59 pm Shinji-Rei in kotetsu no girlfriend 2nd aslo Shinji goes good with Rei in EoE (yes, what you did think :P)

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Mon Nov 14, 2005 4:01 pm Six Winged Angel wrote: aslo Shinji goes good with Rei in EoE (yes, what you did think :P)

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Mon Nov 14, 2005 4:03 pm Asuka X Shinji FTW. And, I'm a Gendo X Yui. We need more Gendo X Yui. Kaji X Misato. Need more of that, too

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Nov 14, 2005 4:09 pm Six Winged Angel wrote: Shinji-Rei in kotetsu no girlfriend 2nd aslo Shinji goes good with Rei in EoE (yes, what you did think :P)

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Nov 14, 2005 4:10 pm nah...not only but they "did it" too :P :P :P erm...not exactly but it doesn't really matter :P

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Nov 14, 2005 4:13 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Anyway, everyone knows Shinji x Maya is the greatest love story never told.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Nov 14, 2005 4:45 pm Shnooks wrote: Asuka X Shinji FTW. And, I'm a Gendo X Yui. We need more Gendo X Yui. Kaji X Misato. Need more of that, too

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Nov 14, 2005 5:42 pm Shinji X Asuka all the way.

[]:             Quote Post by Xanatose » Mon Nov 14, 2005 6:58 pm Shinji x all of the women! (it worked for Love Hina?)

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Mon Nov 14, 2005 7:30 pm Hunter21 wrote: Shnooks wrote: Asuka X Shinji FTW. And, I'm a Gendo X Yui. We need more Gendo X Yui. Kaji X Misato. Need more of that, too

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 14, 2005 7:41 pm My favorite couple is kaworu and that eva monkey guy. They're so dreamy together.

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Mon Nov 14, 2005 8:01 pm Shnooks wrote: Hunter21 wrote: Shnooks wrote: Asuka X Shinji FTW. And, I'm a Gendo X Yui. We need more Gendo X Yui. Kaji X Misato. Need more of that, too

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Nov 14, 2005 8:12 pm You fail to understand all none cute features have been removed by Seele. Resistance is futile, you can not deny our pigtailed overlord!

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Mon Nov 14, 2005 8:32 pm I think shes into guro. Shes gotta be.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Nov 14, 2005 8:42 pm Nope but being an underaged anime character im positive theirs all manner of grotesque fan art on the internet. THats one part of a certain pics sight im not going to miss.

[]:             Quote Post by Shadow » Mon Nov 14, 2005 9:35 pm ...Shinji (x) Rei...

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Mon Nov 14, 2005 9:43 pm It is hard to pair up Shinji with anyone. I want to see him with Asuka but the evidence piles against it. As I said in that other thread, there are three types of love: Emotionl, physical and maternal. He was emotionally attracted to Rei, that is supported in this phrase: Shinji: Maybe if you acted a bit more like Rei... Asuka... I'd like you...

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Tue Nov 15, 2005 6:51 am TsubasaNoKoikokoro wrote: Moar ShinjiXAsuka pron plz. kthnx.
